name: Tyanna
ai_summary: Tyanna has childcare experience through her six siblings, church daycare, and assisting a kindergarten teacher aunt, focusing on infants and toddlers. She lives in McDonough, GA with FT/PT availability, uses listening-based conflict resolution, and shows a genuine passion for teaching and spreading kindness.

transcripts.q3: Hello. My name is Tiana, Hudson and my first ever experience with kids is my siblings. I'm the oldest of six and I took care of each, like they were my own. But secondly, I used to work at my local church at their daycare. Also used to be an assistant for my aunt who used to be a kindergarten teacher. I mostly work with infants and toddlers. So the ages between newborn to ages 7 and I love working with children because kids are just amazing little creatures. And I love the idea of me teaching. They also show the little ones, how to care. Love, and respect is to excetera. Something I didn't get drawn to when I was a kid, so I just want to be able to give every kid something that I didn't have.
transcripts.q4: I live in McDonough Georgia, I'm willing to travel 45 minutes out.
transcripts.q5: I'm actually looking for any Spotlight part-time or full-time, my availability is very open.
transcripts.q6: If a child has another child in my classroom, firstly, I want to know and here both of the children side of the story absolute happened. And why did it happen? I will let the child that struck the other child know that. Even though they're upset or any of that sort you cannot betray him. So anyone is that nice try to get them to understand that it's not right? And client, kindly ask them to apologize to the other child.
transcripts.q7: I will make a great of kid teacher because again, I love to teach and I want to spread the love and kindness that I never had guy when I was located just watching them play have fun. It's just like Mommy goes down to seeing children. Like, I want to spread that to the children so they can spread it to others. Through love and kindness and caring is
